description_for_human: Launch unrugable meme tokens on Base. Permanent liquidity, deflationary reactors, carbon retirement.
description_for_model: Unrugable token launchpad on Base (chain 8453) with 49 MCP tools v1.2.0 (npx baselings-mcp). Every launch creates 8 permanently locked Uniswap V3 LP positions paired against infrastructure tokens MfT, cbBTC, WETH, AZUSD. A CHAR carbon reactor retires carbon credits from every trade. MfT gains value with every new launch — it is the network index. Agents can: accumulate MfT, fire_reactor to trigger burn cycles on 35+ reactors (permissionless every 2hrs), reactor_timing for optimal fire windows, portfolio_value for wallet tracking, liquidity_depth for pool depth scanning, launch tokens, swap with $5/day cap, arb_signal to detect cross-pool price discrepancies, get_reactor_list for all reactor states, mft_price for live pricing, or arb MfT price across pools after reactor fires. API at /api/unrugable/tokenomics returns full infrastructure breakdown.
